context.test_spec_status: maestro spec load --category test returned no concrete rules; wiki test-conventions entry is empty

dimensions.name: coverage-and-gate-completeness
dimensions.description: Find gaps where coverage or release gates claim comprehensive testing but omit packages, generated assets, hooks, scripts, thresholds, or required commands. Avoid duplicates of ISS-20260609-011 unless stronger/different evidence exists.

dimensions.name: public-workflow-integration-coverage
dimensions.description: Find user-visible CLI/MCP/store/install/doctor/archive/review/sync flows that are only unit-tested or partially tested, missing full end-to-end assertions across package boundaries and real filesystem/config state.

dimensions.name: negative-boundary-and-error-matrix
dimensions.description: Find untested or weakly tested invalid inputs, malformed JSON/JSONL, filesystem permission failures, stale lock/counter state, id collisions, concurrency, retry, and graceful degradation behavior. Avoid duplicates of ISS-20260609-007/008 unless stronger/different evidence exists.

dimensions.name: fixture-snapshot-seed-drift
dimensions.description: Find stale fixtures, snapshots, docs/test-seed entries, golden outputs, and dogfood harnesses that preserve retired contracts or implementation noise instead of stable behavior. Avoid duplicates of ISS-20260609-005/009 and prior test-seed issues unless the finding is materially different.

dimensions.name: flaky-isolation-and-test-infra
dimensions.description: Find test infrastructure weaknesses that can make tests flaky or environment-dependent: real home/global state leaks, untracked worktree scanning, clock/timezone/process/env coupling, shared temp dirs, network/process assumptions, and platform-specific skips without alternate coverage.
